title: Find My Device - Playing sound from 2 different devices
scenario: When two devices are paired and connected, playing a sound on the second device fails with an error pop-up until the first device is disconnected.
steps: Play a sound on the first device.
Attempt to play a sound on the second device.
Play a sound on the second device again.
expected: Playing a sound on the second device should work correctly without any error, regardless of the first device's connection status.
